acceptance_criteria.text: All 10 new user prompts are exercised through the browser flow on /dashboard/agents.
proof: Browser-use exercised all 10 prompts on production /dashboard/agents.
gaps: No real agents were created; checks stopped at preview/understanding.

acceptance_criteria.text: Prompts do not map to unrelated older domains.
proof: Inventory, staff schedule, cancellation reasons, admin chats, FAQ, new employee, seasonal services, revenue anomalies, map questions, and location descriptions mapped to their expected domains.

acceptance_criteria.text: Visible builder summary uses user-facing source/result labels.
proof: Frontend source-label mappings added for the new keys.
Browser summary shows Russian user-facing data/result lines.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing behavior remains covered and frontend build succeeds.
gaps: Existing Browserslist/Yandex maps build warnings remain.

acceptance_criteria.text: Production is updated and responds after restart.
proof: Partial deploy copied backend service files and frontend dist.
docker compose ps showed app and worker up.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I --max-time 15 http://localhost:8000'
